title: gladiolus flavoviridis
intro: Gladiolus flavoviridis, also known as the Yellow Sword Lily, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the lily family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus flavoviridis include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed for their medicinal and health benefits.
